tagline: Elegant nail care in the heart of Sonoma for over 15 years
seoDescription: Maxwell Nails Salon has offered manicures, pedicures, and nail art in Sonoma for over 15 years, with a strict focus on cleanliness and single-use sanitation.
heroSubheading: Manicures, pedicures, and stylish nail art in a relaxing Sonoma salon, with strict, single-use sanitation.
aboutBody: Maxwell Nails Salon has been part of Sonoma for over fifteen years, offering elegant manicures, pedicures, and stylish nail art in a relaxing, well-appointed space with comfortable massage chairs. Clients describe gentle, professional, and welcoming service.

Cleanliness comes first: every technician is trained to the strictest sanitation standards, buffers and files are used once and discarded, paraffin wax is never recycled, and every pedicure is done with a fresh liner, so each visit is as safe as it is relaxing.

services.title: Manicures
services.description: Classic and gel manicures finished to a polished, elegant look.

services.title: Pedicures
services.description: Relaxing pedicures in comfortable massage chairs, with fresh single-use liners.

services.title: Nail Art & Design
services.description: Custom nail art and stylish designs for any occasion.

services.title: Sanitation First
services.description: Single-use files and buffers, never-recycled paraffin, and strict sanitation throughout.

notes: Web-verified and authored for the ADA accessibility batch 2 (owner/history, services, awards confirmed from the business site + Yelp/Tripadvisor/press). confirmed:true.
